query:
SELECT 
  f.*,
  DATE(f.dataFollowUp) as data_followup,
  TIME(f.dataFollowUp) as hora_followup,
  CURDATE() as data_hoje,
  NOW() as agora,
  CASE 
    WHEN DATE(f.dataFollowUp) = CURDATE() THEN 'HOJE'
    WHEN DATE(f.dataFollowUp) < CURDATE() THEN 'ATRASADO'
    ELSE 'FUTURO'
  END as situacao,
  l.nome as leadNome
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
WHERE l.nome LIKE '%Marcio Lira%';
